brief_description.reason: The inspection confirmed that a burst pipe beneath the kitchen sink caused significant water discharge.
brief_description.value: burst pipe beneath the kitchen sink caused significant water discharge

what_happened.reason: Water spread across the kitchen and into the adjacent living room area. Moisture readings indicate saturation in flooring materials and partial penetration into subfloor structures. Cabinetry shows swelling and material degradation. Electrical outlets in affected zones require safety inspection and probable replacement.
